name: sherpa
description: Composable /spec, /plan, /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with adversarial review at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; opt-in /persist for state.

interface.shortDescription: Composable spec, plan, and implement layers
interface.longDescription: Adds opt-in Sherpa skills — /spec (refine intent + discover), /plan (decompose into steps), /implement (build with per-step review) — that the user composes into a workflow. Nothing persists unless you call /persist.
defaultPrompt: Use /spec to shape this fuzzy task.
Use /plan to decompose this into steps.
Use /implement to build the approved plan.
